== Notes for [[Item:Q90206|Q90206]] ==

ID: I86621

Name: Plautia Major of Rome

Given Name: Plautia Major

Surname: of Rome

Sex: F

_UID: 5F996991EBAA2F4DB3E083B7B587DABBA114

Change Date: 15 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 77

Death: deceased

Father: Lucius Aelius Plautius Lamia Aelianus b: 45

Mother: Domitia Longina b: 52

Marriage 1 Lucius Ceionius Commodus b: ABT 75

Married:

Children

Lucius of Rome b: ABT 100

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86621

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
